real 'spex issues --all --json' in the live repo, forge reachable: 62 issues in ONE list (33 local + 29 github), interleaved by created newest-first (7 store transitions, sort verified programmatically), same shape both stores (forge issue: by=forge author, forge created, permalink url, Spec: markers pre-translated to nodes=[issues]; local thread: signers/replies/evidence). eval-remark threads split out read-time: 4 'concern: eval: …' threads exist in the raw trunk store, 0 in the list. --store/--node filter; default hides non-open (34 open).

throwaway repo (git init, no remote → gh listIssues fails): 'spex issues --all' exits 0, prints the FULL local list (2/2 threads), and stderr carries exactly ONE loud note 'spex issues: forge unreachable — listing local only (…)'. Local reading never hostaged on the network; degrade never silent.

YATU through the real CLI + real forge: open --store github created shuxueshuxue/spexcode#31 (gh view: OPEN, body carries 'Spec: issues', merged read shows re: issues via tracer); spex issues close github#31 → gh view state CLOSED. Local legs on a disposable store: open default + --store local committed, close resolved landed (idempotent repeat), unknown id / --store bogus fail loud with known-stores list, bare close prints usage exit 2.
Real forge smoke: promoted a disposable local issue to GitHub #32, verified local landed permalink reply, then closed github#32 and read state=CLOSED.

Re-measured at branch head (issues.ts unchanged since d1bee784): throwaway repo with origin pointing at a dead local path, two local threads in a disposable SPEXCODE_ISSUES_DIR — bare 'spex issues' prints the full local list on stdout and EXACTLY ONE loud stderr note ('forge unreachable — listing local only', 1 line total on stderr); the local read never hostages on the network and the degrade is never silent.

real CLI vs live github forge (33 merged: 2 local + 31 github). ONE timeline created-desc — backdated local fixture sorts BETWEEN forge issues (3 store transitions, not grouped); github#25 arrives by=shuxueshuxue, forge createdAt, permalink, Spec: marker translated to nodes=[session-console] (no marker downstream, github#30 w/o marker → nodes=[]); local thread carries replies[1]+evidence[blob hash]; --store/--node filter; default shows 17 open, --all reveals 16 non-open.

open --store github created REAL github#33 through the driver (gh view: body ends 'Spec: issues', author shuxueshuxue); next merged read shows it re: issues with no promote round-trip. close github#33 → gh reads state CLOSED. Local legs: default open + explicit --store local both commit to the (disposable-seam) local store; close <local-id> lands the thread and a repeat close is idempotent (exit 0, status stays landed). Loud errors: --store bogus → 'unknown issue store (known: local, github)' exit 1; close unknown id → store hint exit 1; bare close → usage exit 2.

promote created REAL github#34 (gh view: thread body verbatim + 'Spec: issues' marker + Evidence blob hash + provenance footer naming opener/promoter/created). Merged read links github#34 re: issues through the existing tracer (no new linking code). Local thread ends landed with 'promoted to the forge: <permalink>' reply as trail. Unknown id refuses loud exit 1; re-promoting the landed thread refuses ('is landed — only an open local issue promotes') exit 1; promote with gh off PATH (forge unreachable) fails 'spawn gh ENOENT' exit 1 and leaves the thread byte-identical open with no reply — create-first ordering held.

spex issues reply github#34 posted a REAL comment (gh view: author shuxueshuxue @ 2026-07-06T18:18:19Z, permalink printed). Next merged read carries it in replies[] as the read-back {by: forge commenter, at: forge ts, body} — same Reply shape as local, not a local echo. @5e004c89 in the reply text dispatched '→sent' and the prompt genuinely arrived in that session (observed live); the identical mention on a LOCAL reply produced the identical outcome + delivery — fires on the words, not the store. With gh off PATH the reply fails loud ('spawn gh ENOENT' exit 1), nothing queued: local store sha-identical, comment count still 1.
